answer:
To be eligible for PM Internship Scheme:
• Must be a student currently enrolled in a recognized institution
• Should be in 2nd year or above
• Minimum CGPA of 6.0 or 60%
• Age between 18-25 years
• Indian citizen

Stipend details:
• Varies by company and role (₹8,000 - ₹25,000/month)
• Government provides additional allowance of ₹5,000/month
• Certificate and performance bonus on completion
• Some companies offer full-time job opportunities

Internship duration:
• Minimum: 2 months
• Maximum: 12 months
• Most common: 3-6 months
• Extension possible based on performance
• Part-time and full-time options available

Application process:
1. Register on the portal
2. Complete your profile
3. Upload resume (optional)
4. Browse available internships
5. Smart allocation system will match you
6. Manual application also available
7. Interview with selected companies

Required documents:
• College ID card
• Academic transcripts
• Resume/CV
• Aadhaar card
• Bank account details
• Passport size photograph
• Bonafide certificate from college
I can help you score your resume and provide improvement suggestions! Please upload your resume using the form below, and I'll analyze it for you.

Smart Allocation System:
• AI analyzes your profile, skills, and preferences
• Matches with suitable company requirements
• Considers location preferences
• Factors in academic background
• Success rate: 87%
• Results typically within 48 hours

Contact support:
• Email: support@pminternship.gov.in
• Phone: 1800-123-4567 (Toll-free)
• WhatsApp: +91-98765-43210
• Office hours: 9 AM - 6 PM (Mon-Fri)
• Live chat: Available 24/7
